response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (web, backend, some embedded-adjacent work at National Instruments with C/C++), but the role requires native-level Japanese, deep C/UNIX systems work, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded LAN-switch security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, switch chip SDKs). The resume shows none of these critical requirements — primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang on web and data platforms, and no Japanese proficiency is listed.
strengths: Long track record (10+ years) as a senior/staff engineer with strong testing discipline
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-level DLang systems work
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — hard requirement for the role
No demonstrated experience with embedded networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, switch SDKs)
No Linux kernel modification or embedded firmware experience evident
